text.message: is the cactus not always there?
I thought you were talking about the cactus on the desert
this cactus puts me in a tough tough place here
i kinda wanted to do the sheep strat
anyways i hope u guys want to buy my brick
it will be 2 cards per brick
but it will be available all the time
for him we may do some port service
dang I got solo when I'm at 2?
and i already attacked cactus one too many times
How is it not black lol
in reality i would rob blue
but i had to take the nb
how am i the block lol
if i somehow manage to build 2 cities - then im a threat
now im just a guy with too much sheep and brick
i do it all the time
i do this only cuz we are friends blue
(and also so that u get points and i dont get attacked lol)
if it was a good trade for him
i got the city with 0 ore and low wheat boys
First city with 0 ore hexes lol
Did you really need the 11 ore that hard??
u have a better one on top
Can we please slow down black lol
u want me slowed down but everyone wants my brick, mate
Dont do any ore nb deals
and I have a ton of sheep already
when i have i will be happy to trade for ore
they all want a piece of my hard, shiny brick
lol this guy white just killing my game
I am just trying to get to a port
Why would you give black a 2 for 1
Either trade or have nothing to say about it. Play your own game.
The point is to slow him down
Not feed the guy 2 for 1 trades
we all know u are the one who wants my brick the most
and thats why u are writing this
Why would I want your brick?
I have brick in my hand lol
White just making dumb trades that’s all
Doesn’t matter, he rarely blocked you and fed you win
If I wanted your expertise, I would have asked
I’m not advising you, I’m telling you facts of the game
why are u blocking cactus if i am leading?
(and I do concede that I am leading
know the difference between facts and opinion
You are salty because I cut off your road with the 2:1 trade
i did everything in my power not to plow u there
Bro yapping, nobody’s blocking you lmao, just win the game
i also have an unused mono
